extDescription.message: Select and organize HTML elements for automated testing (CSS Selector and XPath).

toggleSelection.description: Description of the keyboard shortcut command to toggle element selection

openTestSandbox.description: Button to open test sandbox tab

cannotInspectPage.message:
Cannot inspect this page.

This usually happens for one of the following reasons:
1. You are on an internal Chrome page (e.g. chrome://extensions, chrome://newtab).
2. You are on the Chrome Web Store (pages protected by browser security).
3. This tab was already open before loading/reloading the extension. To solve this, simply REFRESH this tab (press F5) and try again.
